name: proton-workflow-connector
description: Unofficial self-hosted MCP connector for Proton Mail Bridge and SimpleLogin.

interface.shortDescription: Self-hosted Proton Mail Bridge and SimpleLogin workflow tools
interface.longDescription: Unofficial connector for using a user's own Proton Mail Bridge and optional SimpleLogin API key from Codex. Not affiliated with Proton AG.
